task_summary: Propose a bounded edit to a single notes file, described as inert intent only.

plan_steps.description: Describe the intended single-file edit and its rationale for operator review.

risk_notes: The edit is bounded to one file; the operator must review and supply the exact after-bytes before any preview.
operator_next_steps: Operator confirms the write_target and supplies the exact after_file bytes, then runs the A2-L2b preview.

patch_intent.summary: Adjust a single bounded value in the notes file.
notes: This is descriptive intent only and carries no applyable diff.
Any actual edit must go through the A2-L2b preview/approve/apply chain.
